Blydreln's Bane  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Blunt Atk Delay: 24
DMG: 11 Dmg Bonus: 35 AC: 10
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +10 AGI: +15 HP: +50
SV COLD: +30
WT: 4.5 Size: TINY
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC BST BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 55

# Jan 04 2003 at 10:48 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591767645236
60 posts
If your going to ToV with less than this, go back to Velks. Some say this has its use with AC/hps on a MA....get a swiftblade of zek if thats the cause cause. You can get it if your fooling around with this guy. Even if this weapon was 13 24 it would still suck, but at least it may be better than what some guildies already have ..... maybe.

Aricon Drinksalot

Everyone gathers around to hear the loot....

-Blydreln's Bane-

oh.......someone pull!

looks nice
QuoteReply
# Jul 15 2002 at 8:51 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591780356516
7 posts
nice stats but the attack delay aint to great although i wouldnt mind someone givin it to my cleric but hes got a groaning mace 23 44 now thats pretty cool but some of you will say not as good as this thats because the thing you kill is 30 not 65 lol. much easier to obtain and pretty easy to sell well i bet no one will look at this tell but if you do send me a tell at 1 of my 3 characters bacoo clearik and deminyin well cya dogs and holar back aight

ok i am a lvl 53 monk on the server MT and i would feed this thing to my destroy button before i used this i have a SoM for you non monkz Septur if mastery 13/21 6agi 6sta this is a FAR better weapon as far as i am conserned

▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Nov 15 2001 at 9:17 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) ~~~~~MONK LEWT~~~~~
Irony though is your epic...
QuoteReply
# Aug 14 2001 at 12:09 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592756505381
Scholar
1,075 posts

They irony is that many classes and people will have their epic before they are in a position to get this item. Though you say "priests" my druid would certainly not use this item instead of her epic nor would any cleric that I know, nor even a shaman.. hmm well actually a shaman might I'm not up on the shaman epic weapon except I know that its an easier one to get and every shaman in our guild seemed to come with one no matter how low level they were.

Maybe my guild did things backwards but most people in it who'd use this had their epics before we even got to TOV as a guild. Maybe a warrior could use it? No idea.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 13 2001 at 9:01 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Who is Blydreln, and why is this her Bane? I think that's the -real- question here.
RE: ...
QuoteReply
# Jan 15 2002 at 3:11 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593965986560
19 posts
My guess on who she is is Vox. The Lady Vox, ice dragon. Sv Cold suggest it, and from what I've heard Vox and Naggy aren't part or the Dragon social circle anymore, which makes me think Blydreln is her first name. Just a thought, I've never even seen a real dragon, been killed by one, but it was a back attack in some lag....so swift...so deadly... damn Gorenaire's claws....

65 posts
This is mostly useful for the priest classes listed, decent dmg/delay for a non-melee as well as a large cold resist.

#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 12 2001 at 8:03 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) you may say this eapon is so so, but i think the major point where this shines is the sv cold. thats a lot for one item, imho.

# Aug 11 2001 at 10:57 PM Rating: Default

so so
QuoteReply
# Aug 11 2001 at 9:34 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591764316439
7 posts
its a nice weapon but i really don't think it matches the risk you have to go through to get it

Venemous Axe of the Velium Brood is 11/24 with a proc, and that is getting to be a relatively common item from velks. The stats are nice and all, but the damage vs delay, i believe is more important.

Overall nice item, but crap compared to other stuff dropped there
▲ Page top
It's nice
QuoteReply
# Aug 11 2001 at 9:51 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750605686
55 posts
Not a bad weapon in and of itself, but I can't see too many people wanting one by the time they could get one. The Damage/delay is okay, but not much compared some of the stuff the melee types would probably be using by the time they were in ToV. The 10 AC is neat, as AC always is on weapons. The stats are pretty damn good otherwise, but would anyone that high up want to take it? Just curious myself, I don't know quite enough about some of the higher end weapons to state my opinion as though it were fact, but it just seems to me that this may not be quite worth it. I could see someone holding it for the stats, and with haste from whatever items/buffs/Bard songs they have on them, the delay may not be that big of a deal. Just curious. Anyone who would know more about it, please respond.
This is just how it would seem to me, anyway. I could very well be wrong. =P

"I shall slap the spam out of you!!"
"My Cleric can cast Strengthen...can yours?"

Jarochai Alabaster
32nd Dwarven Cleric
Officer of Laramie Circle
Brell Serilis Server
▲ Page top
Purpose
QuoteReply
# Aug 12 2001 at 1:42 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763719754
16 posts
The dam / delay isn't THAT wonderful, but this weapon easily has purposes. Most people look for a ubiquitous weapon that they would always hold. But that is a fairy tale. VI wants you to need lots of different tools.

You put this in the off hand of your main aggro holder to give him HP and AC. This is like a mini shield with good stats and it's a weapon. Pair this with another 1hander for warrior's that has AC or something that is just insanely low delay (for creating aggro).

Paladin's could pair it with a shield. Monk's might love it for the HP/AC but the weight seems kinda high for them. All the casters that can use would benefit from AC and HP. And to anyone that has one it's easily in the top 5 best SvC peices around.
▲ Page top
